{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "ClearSCADA/EcoStruxure Geo SCADA Expert is purpose-built SCADA software that supervises and controls remote industrial devices and sensors, making it an active orchestration element in an Industrial IoT deployment; the vulnerability lies in the application layer logic (improper authentication in file handling).",
  "category": "controller",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "The vulnerability affects the firmware of a Foscam C1 Indoor HD IP camera, which is a purpose-built IoT device operating within consumers’ smart-home environments. The issue is in the device’s web-management interface (part of its onboard firmware), making it a device-layer vulnerability in an IoT product.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "consumer iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "Honeywell Experion PKS is an industrial control system composed of purpose-built embedded controller modules that directly monitor and control physical processes. These modules are active elements of an Industrial IoT deployment; the stack-based buffer overflow resides in the firmware/software of those devices, not merely in general IT infrastructure. Therefore the CVE is IoT-specific and maps to the device layer.",
  "category": "industrial controller",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Suprema BioStar 2 is a purpose-built platform for managing biometric access-control devices (fingerprint readers, door controllers). These devices are IoT endpoints, and the server software is an essential application-layer element of that IoT system. The path-traversal flaw therefore directly affects an active IoT component, not general-purpose IT software.",
  "category": "access control",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Bosch IP Helper is a purpose-built tool for discovering and configuring Bosch IP cameras, an IoT camera product line. The software is an active element in the IoT system’s application layer, enabling management of connected devices; therefore the CVE is IoT-specific.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "smart cities iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Proficy HMI/SCADA CIMPLICITY is an industrial control (SCADA) platform that orchestrates and supervises field devices and sensors in industrial installations; this maps to the application layer of the defined IoT ecosystem. The vulnerability affects the SCADA software itself, which is an active, purpose-built element of an Industrial IoT system, so it is classified as IoT.",
  "category": "scada/hmi",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "EcoStruxure Power Monitoring Expert / Power SCADA Operation are purpose-built industrial monitoring and SCADA platforms that interface with field power devices and sensors; they are application-layer components in an industrial IoT deployment, and the URL-redirection flaw resides in this software.",
  "category": "scada",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "B. Braun SpaceCom2 is a medical device module that operates as part of connected infusion systems; the vulnerability lies in its firmware lacking cryptographic signatures. The product itself is an active IoT element, fitting the device layer of the IoT ecosystem.",
  "category": "actuators",
  "sector": "healthcare iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "communication",
  "reason": "Eclipse Mosquitto is an MQTT broker; MQTT is a messaging protocol created for resource-constrained devices and is widely deployed specifically in IoT environments. The vulnerable product is itself an active element of IoT communications. The issue lies in the protocol implementation, fitting the communication layer.",
  "category": "network infrastructure/gateway",
  "sector": "other"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Thermoscan IP is specialized software used to manage network-connected temperature-monitoring devices; it is purpose-built for an IoT deployment (sensor monitoring). The vulnerability is in the software’s installation directory permissions, placing it at the application layer.",
  "category": "sensors",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "The vulnerability resides in the firmware (IDAL FTP server) of ABB Panel Builder 600 devices, which are embedded HMI/industrial control panels used in automation environments. This firmware runs directly on the industrial device, making the product an active element of an IoT (specifically IIoT) system rather than general-purpose IT software or infrastructure.",
  "category": "industrial_controller",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",

The vulnerability exists in the software logic of the trusted-certification feature, placing it in the application layer.",
  "category": "network infrastructure/gateway",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",

  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "consumer iot"
}

{

}

  "label": "IoT",

{

}

{

  "sector": "consumer iot"
}
